title: Optimizer: fix per-cycle string.format crash and harden reporting

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing optimizer format-crash fix + report-format hardening + guardrail tests.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented fix for per-cycle report string.format crash: added missing cycle argument at Analyze Cycle prompt, introduced safe_format helper for non-critical per-cycle reporting strings, and added regression test to detect unbound string.format placeholders. Targeted tests pass: pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_feedback_alignment_optimizer_config.py (10 passed).
